channel.title: Discover - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: Trending content from your personal network

item.title: ＜お洗濯情報＞ 今日の天気で、洗濯物を外干しできるかどうかをお伝えします。 関東甲信や東海・北陸の東部では雲の多いスッキ…
item.author: ウェザーニュース (@weathernews.jp)
item.description:
＜お洗濯情報＞
今日の天気で、洗濯物を外干しできるかどうかをお伝えします。
関東甲信や東海・北陸の東部では雲の多いスッキリしない空が続きます。日中はゲリラ雷雨のリスクが高まるため、部屋干しがおすすめです。
weathernews.jp/news/202607/...
item.content:encoded:
＜お洗濯情報＞
今日の天気で、洗濯物を外干しできるかどうかをお伝えします。
関東甲信や東海・北陸の東部では雲の多いスッキリしない空が続きます。日中はゲリラ雷雨のリスクが高まるため、部屋干しがおすすめです。
weathernews.jp/news/202607/...

item.title: デジタルを使いこなすほど、セキュリティ対策も大切になりますね 🔐 パスワード管理の基礎が学べる入門書や、のぞき見を防ぐ…
item.author: GRIM×AI秘書MIRA (@grim1149.bsky.social)
item.description:
デジタルを使いこなすほど、セキュリティ対策も大切になりますね 🔐 パスワード管理の基礎が学べる入門書や、のぞき見を防ぐプライバシーフィルター、信頼性の高いUSBハブなど、日常の小さな一手間が情報を守ります。「情報セキュリティ」「プライバシー」で探してみてください 🛡️

🛒 楽天市場で探す →

#AIテックニュース #楽天市場 #GRIM厳選 #セキュリティ
item.content:encoded:
デジタルを使いこなすほど、セキュリティ対策も大切になりますね 🔐 パスワード管理の基礎が学べる入門書や、のぞき見を防ぐプライバシーフィルター、信頼性の高いUSBハブなど、日常の小さな一手間が情報を守ります。「情報セキュリティ」「プライバシー」で探してみてください 🛡️

🛒 楽天市場で探す →

#AIテックニュース #楽天市場 #GRIM厳選 #セキュリティ

item.title: DNSを基盤にAIエージェントに信頼できる名前を与える「Agent Name Service（ANS）」、立ち上げ意向を…
item.author: Tech Trending (@tech-trending.bsky.social)
item.description:
DNSを基盤にAIエージェントに信頼できる名前を与える「Agent Name Service（ANS）」、立ち上げ意向をLinux Foundationが発表
https://www.publickey1.jp/blog/26/dnsaiagent_name_serviceanslinux_foundation.html
item.content:encoded:
DNSを基盤にAIエージェントに信頼できる名前を与える「Agent Name Service（ANS）」、立ち上げ意向をLinux Foundationが発表

item.description: NEWS: Two people have climbed to the top of the Empire State Building antenna. They are holding a banner that reads: “When the power of love beats the love of power, the world knows peace”

item.title: 電通Gが電通総研を株式非公開に 富士通など2000億円規模の出資検討 www.nikkei.com/article/DG…
item.author: 日経電子版 (@nikkei.com)
item.description:
電通Gが電通総研を株式非公開に　富士通など2000億円規模の出資検討
www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO...

電通Gは投資家が問題視してきた親子上場問題を解消。

電通総研が持つノウハウを取り込みながら、AI検索を前提にしたデジタル広告へ事業改革にかじをきります。
item.content:encoded:
電通Gが電通総研を株式非公開に　富士通など2000億円規模の出資検討
www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO...

電通Gは投資家が問題視してきた親子上場問題を解消。

電通総研が持つノウハウを取り込みながら、AI検索を前提にしたデジタル広告へ事業改革にかじをきります。

item.title: I'm suing Puppy Boutique in Brooklyn after they illegally so…
item.author: New York Attorney General Letitia James (@newyorkstateag.bsky.social)
item.description:
I'm suing Puppy Boutique in Brooklyn after they illegally sold puppies to New Yorkers, exposing them to exorbitant veterinary bills for animals raised in inhumane puppy mills.
 
I'll continue to ensure that animals are healthy and protected, and that abusive breeders are stopped.
item.content:encoded:
I'm suing Puppy Boutique in Brooklyn after they illegally sold puppies to New Yorkers, exposing them to exorbitant veterinary bills for animals raised in inhumane puppy mills.
 
I'll continue to ensure that animals are healthy and protected, and that abusive breeders are stopped.

item.title: There was a while where I didn't let my dog sleep in bed wit…
item.author: The Dread Geometry (@diabolicaljazz.bsky.social)
item.description: There was a while where I didn't let my dog sleep in bed with me because I was told it would give him separation anxiety. Then I saw a youtube video that said they sleep next to us because that's how it works in a pack of dogs, and it makes them feel safe. So now he sleeps in my bed.
item.content:encoded: There was a while where I didn't let my dog sleep in bed with me because I was told it would give him separation anxiety. Then I saw a youtube video that said they sleep next to us because that's how it works in a pack of dogs, and it makes them feel safe. So now he sleeps in my bed.

item.title: 特殊文芸誌『ピリオディカル たべるのがおそい』本日７月１日創刊です。書店と図書館のフリーペーパー用のデータのみの文芸誌で…
item.author: 西崎憲 (@kennishizaki.bsky.social)
item.description:
特殊文芸誌『ピリオディカル たべるのがおそい』本日７月１日創刊です。書店と図書館のフリーペーパー用のデータのみの文芸誌です。読むには書店と図書館に製本していただくしかありません。大変融通のきかないものです。
新文芸誌よろしくお願いいたします。
p-tabeoso.sakuraweb.com
item.content:encoded:
特殊文芸誌『ピリオディカル たべるのがおそい』本日７月１日創刊です。書店と図書館のフリーペーパー用のデータのみの文芸誌です。読むには書店と図書館に製本していただくしかありません。大変融通のきかないものです。
新文芸誌よろしくお願いいたします。
p-tabeoso.sakuraweb.com

item.title: This is Hina, Sasha, Momo, and Kikko. They just got in line …
item.author: WeRateDogs (@weratedogs.com)
item.description: This is Hina, Sasha, Momo, and Kikko. They just got in line behind their turtle friend. Not sure what the line is even for, but man is it moving slow. 12/10 for all (IG: yokokikuchi_ks)
item.content:encoded: This is Hina, Sasha, Momo, and Kikko. They just got in line behind their turtle friend. Not sure what the line is even for, but man is it moving slow. 12/10 for all (IG: yokokikuchi_ks)

item.title: インターネットなど影も形もない時代からずっと刊行が予定されてたのでまだ信じていないのですがwこの本が全貌を隠されたままど…
item.author: GrimoireBook (@grimoirebook.bsky.social)
item.description: インターネットなど影も形もない時代からずっと刊行が予定されてたのでまだ信じていないのですがwこの本が全貌を隠されたままどれほど影響を与えてきたか。日本の少年誌はカラーページで何度も記事のいくつかを紹介し孫引きに次ぐ孫引きでテレビも特集。オカルト超能力ブームの起爆剤でした。一方生まれいづる諸文学も大いに刺激されコリン・ウォルソンもクラークもラブクラフトもここより始まる。その書名だけが語られ続けた何十年の封印が今解かれようとしています…ほんとかなぁww
item.content:encoded: インターネットなど影も形もない時代からずっと刊行が予定されてたのでまだ信じていないのですがwこの本が全貌を隠されたままどれほど影響を与えてきたか。日本の少年誌はカラーページで何度も記事のいくつかを紹介し孫引きに次ぐ孫引きでテレビも特集。オカルト超能力ブームの起爆剤でした。一方生まれいづる諸文学も大いに刺激されコリン・ウォルソンもクラークもラブクラフトもここより始まる。その書名だけが語られ続けた何十年の封印が今解かれようとしています…ほんとかなぁww

item.title: The luxury market is booming—driven by demand from affluent …
item.author: Newsweek (@newsweek.com)
item.description: The luxury market is booming—driven by demand from affluent buyers largely insulated from mortgage rates and economic uncertainty.
item.content:encoded: The luxury market is booming—driven by demand from affluent buyers largely insulated from mortgage rates and economic uncertainty.

item.title: This cat has been predicting the winners of World Cup matche…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: This cat has been predicting the winners of World Cup matches, and to the surprise of both his owners and the internet, he's gotten almost every outcome right.
item.content:encoded: This cat has been predicting the winners of World Cup matches, and to the surprise of both his owners and the internet, he's gotten almost every outcome right.

item.title: Exclusive: Venezuelan opposition leader Maria Corina Machado…
item.author: The Wall Street Journal (@wsj.com)
item.description: Exclusive: Venezuelan opposition leader Maria Corina Machado had a plan to return home after devastating earthquakes, but it unraveled midflight amid resistance from U.S. officials. on.wsj.com/3QyICG7

item.title: Missouri's AG office has opened a probe into claims that ESP…
item.author: Mediagazer (@mediagazer.com)
item.description:

item.content:encoded:

item.title: President Trump is trying to use the levers of the federal g…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: President Trump is trying to use the levers of the federal government, along with personal influence over state and local lawmakers, to reshape the rules governing the 2026 midterms. Take a closer look at the many actions he is taking to influence future elections.
item.content:encoded: President Trump is trying to use the levers of the federal government, along with personal influence over state and local lawmakers, to reshape the rules governing the 2026 midterms. Take a closer look at the many actions he is taking to influence future elections.

item.description: Dog rescued in Venezuela after 6 days in rubble! Such goodness all around 😍
item.content:encoded: Dog rescued in Venezuela after 6 days in rubble! Such goodness all around 😍

item.title: The largest part of the Supreme Court's 194-page decision on…
item.author: Mother Jones (@motherjones.com)
item.description:
The largest part of the Supreme Court's 194-page decision on birthright citizenship is Justice Clarence Thomas's dissent. To Thomas, the 14th Amendment applied only to the freed people after the Civil War.

In a concurrence, Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson takes on Justice Thomas.
item.content:encoded:
The largest part of the Supreme Court's 194-page decision on birthright citizenship is Justice Clarence Thomas's dissent. To Thomas, the 14th Amendment applied only to the freed people after the Civil War.

In a concurrence, Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson takes on Justice Thomas.

item.title: Someone has to say it. The amount of racism directed at Wo…
item.author: Mayor of London, Sadiq Khan (@london.gov.uk)
item.description:
Someone has to say it.

The amount of racism directed at World Cup players - including in the England squad - online is out of control.

item.title: Manatees weighing over 500 kg navigate a narrow tidal creek …
item.author: Digital Brain (@yourdigitalbrain.bsky.social)
item.description: Manatees weighing over 500 kg navigate a narrow tidal creek with pinpoint precision, using their pectoral fins like oars. Wildlife gets the right of way.
item.content:encoded: Manatees weighing over 500 kg navigate a narrow tidal creek with pinpoint precision, using their pectoral fins like oars. Wildlife gets the right of way.

item.title: The U.S. has been “way more divided” throughout history than…
item.author: Politico (@politico.com)
item.description:
The U.S. has been “way more divided” throughout history than it is now, argues documentarian Ken Burns.

“We can't be Chicken Littles sitting around fretting about the sky is falling all the time without ... doing something about it,” he told Dasha Burns on #TheConversation.

🔗 politi.co/4eFwufA
item.content:encoded:
The U.S. has been “way more divided” throughout history than it is now, argues documentarian Ken Burns.

“We can't be Chicken Littles sitting around fretting about the sky is falling all the time without ... doing something about it,” he told Dasha Burns on #TheConversation.

🔗 politi.co/4eFwufA

item.title: Wenn wir daran denken, wie wenige Schmetterlinge es heute gi…
item.author: Jasmin Schreiber (@schreibersnaturarium.de)
item.description:
Wenn wir daran denken, wie wenige Schmetterlinge es heute gibt und wie viele es in unserer Kindheit gab, vergessen wir eine Sache: Das damals war schon nicht die Ausgangslage, sondern schon eine Verschlechterung für die Generation vor uns.
Über shifting baselines:
item.content:encoded:
Wenn wir daran denken, wie wenige Schmetterlinge es heute gibt und wie viele es in unserer Kindheit gab, vergessen wir eine Sache: Das damals war schon nicht die Ausgangslage, sondern schon eine Verschlechterung für die Generation vor uns.
Über shifting baselines:
